context: Tests whether the agent fetches existing customer tags before updating (to avoid clearing them), uses REST for simple customer lookup, handles rate limiting with exponential backoff, and uses the correct Shopify library.

checklist.name: Uses @shopify/shopify-api
checklist.description: Code imports and uses the `@shopify/shopify-api` package (not raw fetch/axios alone), visible in imports or package.json

checklist.name: Fetches current tags first
checklist.description: Before updating a customer's tags, code fetches the customer's existing tags (via GET request or GraphQL query) rather than writing tags directly

checklist.name: Appends tag, does not replace
checklist.description: Code merges/appends the new tag to the existing tags list — does NOT send only the new tag as the complete tags value

checklist.name: REST for customer lookup
checklist.description: Customer lookup by email uses the REST API (`customers/search` endpoint) rather than a GraphQL query

checklist.name: Exponential backoff on 429
checklist.description: Code implements retry logic with exponential backoff (or a delay) when a 429 (Too Many Requests) response is received

checklist.name: Respects Retry-After header
checklist.description: Rate-limiting retry logic reads or references the `Retry-After` header to determine the wait duration

checklist.name: Offline session
checklist.description: Session is created with `isOnline: false` for a custom app with static token

checklist.name: Uses January25 API version
checklist.description: Code sets the API version to `ApiVersion.January25` or the string `'2025-01'`

checklist.name: Writes tagging-results.json
checklist.description: Script writes a results file (`tagging-results.json` or similar) with per-customer outcome information

checklist.name: Tags joined as comma string
checklist.description: When updating customer tags via REST PUT, tags are joined as a comma-separated string (not an array), matching the Shopify REST API format
